full_text:
Guan Jing (Shiqi) 關靖 (士起)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guan Jing (關靖), styledShiqi (士起), was born in Taiyuan. Adviser to Gongsun Zan. Died fighting Yuan Shao’s army at Beiping. Guan Jing was affiliated with Gongsun Zan. Guan Jing lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
